# Transcript
* KHTTI
**
*OS LAMPTRE
AMPRIAS QORAIEYS
KOIFREWN PAMBWTA
YFILHTOS FLYEYS
NHSIQEOS KOPREIOS
LYSISTRATOS RAMNOY
RC NIKHTHS SKAMBWN
*S XENOFANTOS KEIRI
L QEOTIMOS LAMPTR
ESMOQETAI
SWKRATHS QORAIEYS
KALLITELHS PLWQEY

YSANDROS ACARNE
